channel.title: UPSSSC on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in UPSSSC on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: UPSSSC Lower PCS Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Lower Subordinate Recruitment 2026 is a state-level government job notification released for 2285 posts under various departments of Uttar Pradesh. The online application process starts from 29 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 18 June 2026. Candidates must have a graduation degree and a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 score card to be eligible. The application fee is ₹25 for all categories, and both male and female candidates can apply.

item.title: UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 has announced a total of 2759 vacancies for the post of Technical Assistant (Agriculture). Candidates must have a Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture and a valid PET 2025 score to apply. The application process starts from 22 May 2026 and ends on 11 June 2026. The application fee is ₹25 for all categories. The selection process includes shortlisting based on PET, a written examination, and document verification. Both male and female candidates are eligible to apply.

item.title: UPSSSC Assistant Statistical Officer ASO Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC has released the notification for Assistant Statistical Officer (ASO) / Assistant Research Officer (ARO) Recruitment 2026. A total of 929 posts are available. The online application will start from 21 April 2026 and the last date to apply is 11 May 2026. Candidates must have a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 score along with required educational qualifications. Both male and female candidates can apply. Selection will be based on PET score shortlisting followed by a mains written examination.

item.title: UPSSSC Assistant Boring Technician Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Assistant Boring Technician Recruitment 2026 has been released for 402 posts. Only candidates qualified in PET 2025 are eligible to apply. The online application process will start from 15 April 2026 and continue till 05 May 2026. The selection process includes shortlisting based on PET score followed by a main written examination.

item.title: UPSSSC Teacher Cadre (JTC) Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Assistant Teacher Recruitment 2026: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released the notification for Assistant Teacher (Special Education) recruitment 2026. A total of 58 posts are available for various special schools including hearing impaired, visual impairment, mental disability and deaf blind schools. Candidates who have 12th pass with Special Education Diploma, RCI registration and UPSSSC PET 2025 score card are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit the online application form from 06/04/2026 to 27/04/2026 through the official website. Applicants are advised to read the official notification carefully before applying.

item.title: UPSSSC PCB Various Post Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Pollution Control Board Recruitment 2026 has been released for 115 posts in the Uttar Pradesh Pollution Control Board. The online application process will start from 02 April 2026 and the last date to apply is 22 April 2026. Candidates must have a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 score to apply. The recruitment includes posts such as Junior Environmental Engineer, Lab Assistant, Scientific Assistant, Technical Assistant, and Assistant Chemist.

item.title: UPSSSC Pharmacist Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Pharmacist (Allopathy) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for 560 vacancies under the Directorate of Medical & Health Services, Uttar Pradesh. Candidates holding a Diploma in Pharmacy and valid UP Pharmacy Council registration can apply online from 09/03/2026 to 29/03/2026. The selection will be based on a written examination. Interested applicants should check eligibility, age limit, and important dates before applying online.
